overview: Sir C.R. Reddy College of Pharmaceutical Sciences (CRRCOPS), located in Eluru, Andhra Pradesh, is a pharmacy-focused institution known for its pharmaceutical education, laboratory infrastructure, and industry-oriented training programs. The college actively supports placements, pharmaceutical research exposure, and academic development for undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral pharmacy students.
accreditation: NAAC 'A' Grade accredited (Cycle 1) with a CGPA of 3.25 on a 4-point scale.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Approximately ₹48,300 per year (~₹1.93 Lakhs total for the complete course).

placements.placementRate: Approximately 60% – 85% depending on specialization and eligibility
placements.totalOffers: Multiple offers through campus recruitment drives and off-campus hiring initiatives
placements.companiesVisited: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories, Cadila Healthcare, Avenida, Optum, Cognizant, and regional healthcare organizations
placements.internationalOffers: Limited international healthcare and research-linked opportunities through specialized recruiters

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted through state-level entrance examinations and counseling procedures regulated by Andhra Pradesh technical and pharmacy education authorities.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions generally follow AP EAPCET, PGECET, and LPCET counseling schedules announced by the Andhra Pradesh State Council.

campus.specialNote: Hostel and mess charges range between ₹40,000 and ₹55,000 annually. One-time admission and registration-related charges range from ₹5,000 to ₹10,000.

scholarships.details: Eligible students from economically weaker and reserved category backgrounds can avail tuition reimbursement and scholarship benefits under Andhra Pradesh government welfare schemes.

contact.address: Sir C.R.Reddy College of Pharmaceutical Sciences Santhi Nagar, GNT Road, Eluru, Andhra Pradesh 534007
